candidates.label: Nano plc-dcs-programming-and-migration overview-card Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "service overview card thumbnail",
  "goal": "A neatly organized PLC rack with glowing status LEDs and perfect cable management.",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "85mm",
    "aperture": "f/4",
    "light_source": "cool, dim cabinet lighting emphasizing LED glows"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "layered PLC modules filling the frame",
    "glowing LEDs drawing the eye"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "dark plastics, metallic rails, distinct green and amber LED lights.",
  "material_notes": [
    "industrial polymer housings",
    "metallic heat sinks",
    "glowing diodes"
  ],
  "scene": "A high-end, modern Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) rack actively processing data, showcasing operational readiness.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "authentic PLC form factor",
    "I/O module LED status lights",
    "organized wire ducts"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "3:2",
    "focal_structure": "diagonal or flat architectural view of the rack"
  },
  "avoid": [
    "consumer PC motherboards",
    "retro/obsolete hardware",
    "messy wiring"
  ]
}
candidates.responseText: I've analyzed the generated image against your JSON specification, and the result is a precise match. The composition perfectly balances the layered PLC modules, neat wire ducts, and the specific lighting environment requested. Every aspect, from the diagonal viewpoint to the distinct color scheme of the LEDs and materials, aligns with your asset-type and technical requirements. I will show the image to the user.
